# Dreative executable creative catalogue

Search the machine-readable catalogue before selecting an advanced mechanism:

    dreative catalogue --query "image tornado" --json

Natural-language aliases include photo disintegration, photo reconstruction,
scroll image sequence, frame-by-frame product animation, velocity distortion,
smooth-scroll WebGL, persistent product across sections, shared-element
transition, image tears into pieces, type becomes image, 3D gallery,
drag-controlled images, cinematic video chapter, depth-map zoom, liquid chrome,
video becomes layout, media plane distortion, and spatial product story.

The compiled catalogue is `dist/shared/creativeCatalog.js`. Human implementation
guidance is in `references/CREATIVE_EXECUTION.md`, primitive contracts in
`recipes/primitives.md`, and tested patterns in `recipes/positive-exemplars.md`.
React Bits is reference vocabulary only and is never distributed by Dreative.
The catalogue is an implementation lookup after a project-native concept has
been chosen. It must never supply the concept or a named site's house style.
Native scroll is the default. GSAP, Lenis, WebGL, and build-time media tools are
selected only when the mechanism earns its cost and the capability is present.
